creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 159366
Update sysutils/usb_modeswitch to 2.2.5

Dear maintainer

A new usb_modeswitch version was released which I've tested on 10.1-R amd64 against a Huawei 3G dongle with success. It has passed portlint -A so far, but I'm not 100% sure about how "make makeplist" is doing things, but I can confirm that both the old and the new pkg-plist work as expect here.

Best regards
Mathieu
